'''gashïfpïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aracanid|aracanid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aracanid|aracanid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| gashïfpïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gæshïfpïfth || gæshïfpïfj || gæshïfpïfsh || gæshïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gashïfshïfpïfth || gashïfshïfpïfj || gashïfshïfpïfsh || gashïfshïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gashïfpïfth || gashïfpïfj || gashïfpïfsh || gashïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gashïffpïffth || gashïffpïffj || gashïffpïffsh || gashïffpïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gashïfpïfïf || gashïfpïfïf || gashïfpïfïf || gashïfpïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || gashïfpïfth || gashïfpïfj || gashïfpïfsh || gashïfpïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gashïfpïfïfl || gashïfpïfïfl || gashïfpïfïfl || gashïfpïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gashïfpïfïfïf || gashïfpïfïfïf || gashïfpïfïfïf || gashïfpïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || gashïfpïfïfn || gashïfpïfïfn || gashïfpïfïfn || gashïfpïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gashïfpïfïforo || gashïfpïfïforo || gashïfpïfïforo || gashïfpïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
